retrieved_result: Highmark Medicare Services Inc Becomes Novitas Solutions Inc Friday, March 09, 2012Highmark Medicare Services Inc Becomes Novitas Solutions Inc Physical therapists in Delaware, New Jersey, Pennsylvania, Maryland, and the District of Columbia should be aware of a name change for the Part A and Part B Medicare Administrative Contractor (MAC) for Jurisdiction 12
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses a name change of a Medicare Administrative Contractor and is unrelated to debugging API integration.

history.title: Highmark Medicare Services Inc Becomes Novitas Solutions Inc
history.description: Friday, March 09, 2012Highmark Medicare Services Inc Becomes Novitas Solutions Inc Physical therapists in Delaware, New Jersey, Pennsylvania, Maryland, and the District of Columbia should be aware of a name change for the Part A and Part B Medicare Administrative Contractor (MAC) for Jurisdiction 12
